summary: Comprehensive testing of Shree Mother Gold B2B platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (18/18 tests passed). Frontend mostly functional with one critical navigation issue preventing product detail page access.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on products in category listing redirects to homepage instead of product detail page
ui_bugs.affected_flow: Product detail page access, customization testing, Add to Cart functionality

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access product detail pages to test customization dropdowns and cart functionality

passed_tests: Homepage renders with hero, features, process steps, stats, CTAs
Admin dashboard with overview stats (480 products, 1 retailer, 1 enquiry, 1 customisation)
Retailer registration form with all required fields
Contact form submission with success message
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix product detail page navigation issue - clicking on products in category listing should navigate to product detail page instead of redirecting to homepage. This is blocking testing of customization features, Add to Cart functionality, and image slider.
